ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2003 Off Calendar: Trial De Novo Filed

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218
Off Calendar Nov-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Appearances:
Gerard Anthony Hurtubise, Esq. for Petitioner: Revital Aharon present as guardian ad litem for Sagiv Aharon, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Attorney's fees: $18,873.00
A net balance of $37,751.72 to be deposited into a blocked account with
Bank Of America, Branch #266, 3701 Balboa St. San Francisco, Ca. 94121, until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Orders signed in court.
